subject: Re: Exporting particle stack files to cisTEM
body:
Hi Chris,

You can use relion_stack_create to convert all the .mrcs files into one 
large .mrcs file

$relion_stack_create --i STAR_FILE --o ROOT_STACKOUT

Good luck!
Jason

On Tuesday, January 22, 2019 at 12:48:11 PM UTC-6, C Arthur wrote:
>
> Hi,
> I am working on exporting picked particles to cisTEM. cisTEM is looking 
> for a STAR file, and a one particle stack file. From what I can tell, WARP 
> creates the STAR file, but creates a particle stack file for each 
> individual micrograph (.mrcs). Is it possible to export a single particle 
> stack file?
> Many thanks!
> -Chris
>
